programme.desc: After Ironside talks to a criminology class, sniper fire wounds a student; with Brenda Scott, Peter Deuel.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside and his staff baby-sit an abandoned infant who is the main clue to the identity of a would-be airplane bomber.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Brown is wrongly accused of police brutality in his apprehension of a girl who later died from head injuries.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Frustrated with police progress, Mark decides to solve his girlfriend's murder; with Dwayne Hickman, David Carradine.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Model Citizen
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the gangland-style murder of a highly respected union leader, making everyone question why a man with a spotless record would be murdered in the first place. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Parting Shots
programme.desc: Detective Jonah Newman (guest star Dan Shor) is gunned down in front of his fellow detectives who must find the killer while coming to grips with the loss of their colleague and the danger of their jobs. Starring Sharon Gless and Tyne Daly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: You Call This Plainclothes?
programme.desc: After a series of murders take place involving prostitutes, Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) go undercover in the hopes of finding who keeps killing the women. Also starring Al Waxman, Carl Lumbly, and John Karlen.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Pop Used To Work In Chinatown
programme.desc: A Chinatown robbery brings Cagney's retired father back on the beat to show his daughter how to properly conduct an investigation. Guest starring Dick O'Neill as Charlie Cagney. Tyne Daly, Meg Foster, Al Waxman, and Carl Lumbly star.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Beyond The Golden Door
programme.desc: In the hopes of finding a missing child, Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) go undercover as workers in the garment industry and end up helping an undocumented worker from Guatemala find her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Under Fire
programme.desc: A series of armored car heists and bloody shoot-outs shocked law enforcement. The brutal violence of the crimes suggested a motive more complex than greed. When the robbers started targeting police, the FBI took charge.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped, a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Bad Trip
programme.desc: On August 20, 2001, Charles Tremblay, 15, was beaten, then thrown into the St-Charles River where he drowned. Tremblay's body was discovered in the mud less than 24 hours after his death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: After finding the body of a young girl in a stream located in the suburbs of Montreal, investigators strive to retrace a murderer who knew how to use water to his advantage.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: On October 1, 2000, 10-year-old Heather Thomas disappeared from her father’s Cloverdale townhouse. Ertmoed is arrested and confesses that he lured Heather into his apartment on the pretext of showing her pictures of birds and strangles her to death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner's Casebook
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Bone
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner Investigator
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial By Fire
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Mr. Swindler returns and gets Jon to sell the house for $1. Wade’s forgetful cousin arrives.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield is adopted by an elderly lady. Roy buys a robot that creates weather.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield tests the audience. Orson offers his version of “The Rooser.”

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon’s bumbling cousin comes to stay. Garfield is turned into a werewolf.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon is harassed by a magazine salesman. An escaped saber tooth tiger switches identities with Garfield.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon joins a weight-reducing program that offers its own food. When Garfield wishes there were no Mondays.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield is called up before the council. Garfield’s neighbor is being driven crazy by the cat’s antics.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield end up in the ring wrestling the Masked Mauler. Leftovers run rampant in Jon’s refrigerator.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield discovers Jon’s new ventriloquist dummy is alive. Jon decides to take up skydiving.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield uses Nermal’s cuteness to get goodies. The crew finds a chocolate mine.

programme.title: On the Case: Where Evil Lies
programme.desc: A 25-year-old aspiring model vanishes, and the only clue police have is her empty car found near a cemetery.

programme.title: On the Case: Betrayal in the Mountains
programme.desc: A man calls 911, saying his wife had been shot when she walked in on a robbery, and that he had used deadly force on the intruder. The investigation of what seems like an open-and-shut case of self defense reveals the secrets of several past murders.

programme.title: On the Case: Mystery, Heartbreak and Justice
programme.desc: A look at three cases in which the quest for justice rages on after the verdict has been delivered.

programme.title: On the Case: Crossed by Evil
programme.desc: Police race to find a young woman who disappeared on her way to work, but the clues they discover reveal a trail of unspeakable evil.

programme.title: On the Case: From Dusk to Darkness
programme.desc: After a 10-year-old girl mysteriously disappears, her family and the police undergo a tormenting journey to find a lead.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Clare Wood
programme.desc: In April 2007, Clare Wood met George Appleton on a dating website and they embarked on a relationship together. Unbeknownst to her, Appleton was a criminal with a severe history of violence against women.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Suzy Lamplugh
programme.desc: A look at the case of estate agent Suzy Lamplugh, who showed a client around a house in Fulham in July 1986 and was never seen again. Dermot Murnaghan hosts.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs
programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: 48 Hours: Power and Passion
programme.desc: 48 Hours probes case of Alabama politician Stephen Nodine -- accused in the 2010 shooting death of his mistress, Angel Downs.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death at Soho House
programme.desc: In the relationship between an Oscar-winner's son and his fashion designer girlfriend, one is found dead.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Raging Son
programme.desc: A cell phone captures the murder of a Weight Watchers executive by a Wall Street lawyer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Preppy Killer
programme.desc: Robert Chambers speaks out after serving 15 years in prison for the 1986 murder of Jennifer Levin.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hollywood Secrets
programme.desc: The investigation into the 2008 murder of Juliana Redding, an aspiring actress and model and the subsequent trial. Redding was found dead in her Santa Monica, California home

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation in Texas
programme.desc: A report about the 2011 shooting death of Greg Williams, and the question of whether he was killed with his own gun by an intruder inside his suburban Dallas home - as his wife Michele Williams has claimed - or if Michele herself was guilty of the crime.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: High school volleyball player Jeanna Giese is fatigued and has numbness in her arm. When she experiences double-vision and loss of balance, doctors know it is far more sinister than a sports injury.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: A rare genetic disease that prevents sufferers from sleeping becomes more and more extreme until eventually it causes death.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Chess Nuts
programme.desc: Oscar learns that Felix was a nationally ranked chess player as a child and convinces him to return to the game to make money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Felix forces Oscar and Emily to go on a date to get to know each other better in the hope that they'll become friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Road Scholar
programme.desc: In an attempt to surprise Emily, Felix gets his learner's permit and enlists his friends to help him learn how to drive.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s stint on a movie set leads to romance with the female star. Holly struggles with having to fire someone for the first time.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil makes a big mistake on his first date with a movie star so Holly has to infiltrate the red carpet to bail him out. Stuart and Haskell compete over who can get the most Twitter followers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly and Nicki plan a girls’ night out, but wind up competing for the same guy. Phil realizes dating a movie star is much more difficult than he imagined.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Stuart have a fight with Haskell and he moves out. Holly, desperate to keep them all together, sends Phil and Stuart to bring him home.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidently convinces Stuart to quit his dental practice and buy a restaurant. Haskell, sick of paying alimony, tries to persuade his ex wife Margo to marry her fiancé.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart and Holly convince Margo to hold her wedding at their restaurant. Haskell, still desperately in love with Margo, tries to stop it.

programme.title: The Exes: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) uses Holly’s assistant to help him land a star jockey as a client, but he’s got his eyes on a bigger prize. Haskell (Wayne Knight) talks Stuart into selling sentimental mementos from his marriage but Stuart has trouble letting go.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit, because he used Phil’s (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a popular DJ is found murdered in a local garden, the cops race to find answers. With no other leads, the police turn to a blood spatter expert.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Robert Andrew and his wife Brenda were gunned down in their garage in an upscale neighbourhood in Oklahoma City. The forensic team hope to help find Robert's killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful as he used poison which had no taste or odour. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The victim was brutally murdered as he slept in his own bed. There are no foreign fingerprints in his home, but investigators find shoe impression in the mud outside and physical evidence they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime, a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hope the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene will put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Jason Webster was an undergraduate who became obsessed with mature student, Rebecca love. When Rebecca rejected his advances, he murdered her in a drunken rage.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Buck Ruxton was a well-respected GP and was greatly admired by his patients. But behind his respectable exterior, there lurked a duplicitous and jealous man.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: A bizarre murder case began when police attended the scene of a dog barking outside a camper van. Inside, they found its owner, Tony Robinson, murdered.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Evil Eyes
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Frenzy
programme.desc: Three bodies are found in a house, arms tied behind their backs. Stab wounds to the neck. Bloody footprints in the hall. A killing spree that leaves a woman, her boyfriend and a church deacon dead.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Ghost
programme.desc: A cunning arsonist stays one step ahead of the police and terrifies a small farming community until behavioural profiling help detectives zero in on a very unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murder in Le Grand Bornand (Flactif case)
programme.desc: Xavier Flactif, his partner Graziella and their three children suddenly disappear. For several days, mystery reigns.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake
programme.desc: On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.

programme.title: The Case: Murder in the Vineyards
programme.desc: On December 6, 2012, Jean Aprin's lifeless body was found on his Roquebrussanne winery.

programme.title: The Case: The Hunt for Antonio Ferrara
programme.desc: The tale of a manhunt where phone taps, bates and snitches come and go.

programme.title: The Case: Murder at the Boarding School
programme.desc: In November 2011 Agnès Marin, 13, vanishes from her boarding school in the Cévennes.

programme.title: The Case: The Angers Pedophile Network
programme.desc: In 2002, the biggest case of pedophilia in France breaks out in Angers.

programme.title: The Case: A French Cold Case
programme.desc: The murder of 16-year-old schoolgirl Christelle Maillery, committed at Le Creusot in 1986.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When mother Mary Davis is found murdered, the case spans decades. Bleeding edge forensics could hold the answers.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Serial rapes spur fear in a city in North Carolina. Years later new forensic science finds the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1993, the brutal murder of 15-year-old Melissa Lee shocked a Seattle suburb. The investigation proved fruitless. Thirty years later, the cold case was reopened. Will there be a breakthrough in the case?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A woman in Texas is killed and dumped in an old basement. The hosts attempt to determine whether new forensic tools are capable of finding the murderer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 2024, Pamela Wittman, a 25-year-old from Indiana, was identified as a victim in the 1980 Daytona Beach cold case linked to a serial killer.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Having begun a fitness and diet regime, Terry is shocked when he believes he overhears the doctor, on the telephone, saying that he is terminally ill.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: A clock goes missing and, coincidentally, a tramp is found sleeping in Terry's shed, but is it safe to jump to conclusions?

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: After an accident involving a refuse cart, Terry decides to defend himself in court, but his bumbling nature soon sees justice undone.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When the vicar and Mrs Dingle decide to reopen the youth club, they enlist Terry's help to assemble a ping-pong table. The instructions should be idiot-proof, but whoever wrote them had not taken Terry into account.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: One-upmanship is the name of the game when Terry discovers that a junior member of the office staff has a satellite dish.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry learns of the death of Uncle Charlie and attends the funeral with June. He is given Uncle Charlie's ashes to scatter but due to a mix-up he gets arrested when sniffer dogs lead the police to mistake the ashes for drugs.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: A mishap with a new oil portrait of Sir Dennis leads to a staged break-in at Malcolm's house.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry tries to ingratiate himself with his boss by volunteering June's services as tea-maker to the cricket team.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Laura Garza told friends she was going on a night out at the Marquee Club. When she didn't show for work the next day a search ensued to find her as well as the men she left with.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Mary Ann Perez left a bar just outside of New Orleans. Early the next morning, her family received a call from an anonymous woman, mentioning Mary had run into car trouble. She never returned home.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the tragic murder of Brett Wentworth, how police tracked his killer down and how advanced forensic technology was key to solving the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Wendy Speakes was found dead wearing a stranger's shoes, police launched an investigation into who could have murdered a well-loved member of a quiet community.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Sharon Whelan and her two daughters were murdered in their home on Christmas Eve by a cold and calculating killer. Multidiscipline forensics uncovered his horrific actions and brought him to justice.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork In Never-Never Land
programme.desc: With Mindy depressed about not getting a scholarship, it's up to Mork to stir up some laughs, so he brings home a friend who claims to be the real Peter Pan, with the power to fly as just one of his magical talents.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Dueling Skates

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork the Prankster
programme.desc: Spaceman Mork gets so cosmically carried away with pulling practical jokes that he surprises Mindy by assembling her jeep in their living room right over Mr. Bickley's apartment - with disastrous results.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork, The Monkey's Uncle
programme.desc: Mork turns the apartment he shares with Mindy into a hilarious hideaway for a young chimpanzee that he kidnaps from the Boulder zoo in the mistaken belief that the animal's mother has been abducted.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork's New Look
programme.desc: Mork sends the face-lifting business into orbit when he hilariously rushes to a plastic surgeon to shoot the works after Mindy gives Mork the idea that everyone could use a little improverrent on Mork & Mindy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork and The Bum Rap
programme.desc: Naive Mork puts on his own out-of-this-world telethon to help Mindy raise charity funds, but is such a funny failure at fund-raising that he turns to his own outrageous brand of panhandling to come up with the needed money.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: There's A New Mork In Town
programme.desc: Mork faces almost unbeatable competition for his job as official Earth observer from his Orkan hero, the suave and charming Xerko, who beams to Earth to challenge Mork to an outrageous contest for the right to send reports back to Ork.

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill
programme.desc: Was nurse Kimberly Saenz guilty of murder, using dialysis equipment to kill? Was she a medical serial killer?

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill
programme.desc: German nurse Niels ‘H' admits he has killed patients, but the mystery of how many, and how, remains unsolved.

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill
programme.desc: How was nurse Colin Norris able to deflect suspicion from the many medical murders that occurred on his watch?

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill

programme.title: Cybercrimes with Ben Hammersley
programme.desc: Delve into the dark web (accessible through software like Tor) and the drug dealing market known as Silk Road.

programme.title: Cybercrimes with Ben Hammersley
programme.desc: In 2013, $45 million was stolen from banks after cybercriminals hacked credit cards for unlimited withdrawals.

programme.desc: It’s Friday the 13th, and for one day only, Sabrina can tell her friends she’s a witch.

programme.desc: Sabrina’s lack of attention with detail causes bad side effects to her magic.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Little Big Kraft

programme.desc: Jon Peacock has a late night encounter with two unusual lawbreakers.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary series following an Essex police unit.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary series following an Essex police unit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Back in the Hood
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: One for the Road
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived. The only question is, whom?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: True Identity
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Match Point
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known addresses."

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Menehune Mischief
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits - Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers - the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mister Mom
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bait & Snitch
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend the posse heads out to bring a client with a checked past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sweatin' Bullets
programme.desc: When a heat wave envelops West Monroe the air conditioning unit at the Duck Commander warehouse goes down, turning the duck call assembly room into a boiling sweatshop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Spring Pong Cleaning
programme.desc: After Korie decides the junk piles in the Duck Commander warehouse are beginning to reach critical mass, she calls on Willie and the guys to do a little company spring-cleaning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Morning, West Monroe
programme.desc: After attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie sees an opportunity to host a show of his own.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Of Mattresses and Men
programme.desc: The Jase, Si and the guys from the duck call room take a field trip to a brand new local donut shop and quickly find out who amongst them can eat the most delicious treats.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Samurai Si
programme.desc: Willie receives a special gift from a Japanese business associate - a "priceless" samurai sword, which Willie keeps out of the hands of Jase and the guys.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drag Me To Glory
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Season Eve
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Can't Hardly Weight
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realizes that he could stand to lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Shot Thru The Heart
programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Lizard, Lizard
programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Song for Jason - Part 1
programme.desc: Mark and Jonathan become counselors at a camp for children with cancer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Song for Jason - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are helping patients at Camp Good Times in different ways. But a father still refuses to deal with his son's illness.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Bless the Boys in Blue
programme.desc: Jonathan relinquishes his angelic powers for awhile and realizes the dangers that Mark has faced being a police officer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Cindy
programme.desc: An aspiring actress wants to be accepted for who she really is, not in the image her well-meaning dad tries to transform her into.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Devil and Jonathan Smith
programme.desc: Mark has been tricked into selling his soul in order to save a little girl's life. But the Devil has another agenda: acquiring Jonathan's soul.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 6
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: With science closer than ever to proving that life once lived on Mars, is there a chance that something still exists there?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Join us as we investigate the existence of UFOs and determine the possibility that they may be from Earth.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Explore the increase in UFO sightings that occurred during the spring of 1952.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Solar System UFOs: Discover the shocking truth about alien civilisations in our solar system. Check out derelict spacecrafts and explore the mysterious origins of UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Alien Bodies: Uncover the shocking truth about alien remains as experts investigate unsettling reports of extraterrestrial bodies recovered from crashed UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Signs of Abduction: From loss of time and bizarre hazy memories, to terrifying accounts of alien surgery, these are the hidden signs of alien abduction.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: For many people, the most credible UFO reports are those raised by law enforcement. We investigate the most significant reports from police records.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 10
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Dynasty: Colorado Roulette
programme.desc: Adam is absolved of suspicion in the kidnapping of his son when Leslie calls him to say that Sean has taken the baby and is holding her captive. Adam and Steven hurry to the desolate mountain cabin.

programme.title: Dynasty: Broken Krystle
programme.desc: Following Sean's death, Alexis is comforted by Dex's solace and friendship, as the two renew their passionate love for each; Jeff and Sammy Jo are horrified to find her diary and a dead body in the water.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Touch of Sable
programme.desc: Sammy Jo and Jeff are relieved when they discover the body found floating in the lake is not Krystle; Blake's fears increase when Krystle's car is found and the man arrested for stealing it is a convicted murder.

programme.title: Dynasty: She's Back
programme.desc: Enjoying his time with Krystle in Dayton, Blake remains perplexed by the case of her memory lapses, federal they may occur again; As Krystle shakes her head, not recognizing the body; Blake stares with schlock at the familiar faces.

programme.title: Dynasty: Body Trouble
programme.desc: Blake gives Jeff one-third controlling interest in Denver-Carrington, postponing Adam's plans to gain sole control of the company; Blake and Krystle meet with Dr. Hampton to begin tests, while Blake tells her the true reason for her severe headaches.

programme.title: Dynasty: Alexis in Blunderland
programme.desc: Suspecting her accountant has worked with Sean to ruin Colbyco, Alexis faces the reality she may lose her empire; receiving bad news from her doctor, Krystle asks Fallon to gather the family.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tracie & Sammie
programme.desc: Tracie Thoms had a connection with a fan named 'Sammie' after hearing about the passing of Sammie's friend. Sammie suddenly disappeared and now Tracie is left wondering who Sammie really is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: John & Kelsey
programme.desc: John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jeff & Megan
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Bianca & Brogan
programme.desc: When Brogan disappears from the Internet, then returns online after a year without question, Bianca wants to know what happened in the missing year.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Freeze
programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Test Case
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force must end the murderous career of a bacteriologist working for the enemy, who has succeeded in developing a mutant strain of a deadly bacteria which could be used as a practical battlefield weapon.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The System

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Glass Cage
programme.desc: An electronically guarded prison confronts the Impossible Missions Force when it tries to free a political prisoner (Richard Garland) from an escape-proof glass cell.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Live Bait
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force invades the intricate world of spies to protect an American double agent and comes up against a human time bomb.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to North Yorkshire to pick up a veteran London-to-Brighton car. There's an emotional farewell to a 1980s Bedford HA van, and a Toyota Corona finds a new home.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to Teesside to pick up a 1953 MG YB, a Moggy Van and an '80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Lancashire coast to pick up a rare 1972 Citroën SM, and Dave is on HQ duties and admires a Punto that's two decades old but has just 42 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek is on the road to pick up a funky little Nissan Figaro and a sublime Ferrari 250 GT tribute car, and Paul gets to try out his sparkling new Scania T Cab.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Oxford paramedics are called to a woman who sustained a broken leg and horrific facial injuries, while in Portsmouth, a 2-year-old with breathing problems needs a nebuliser.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics in Oxford treat a woman suffering from a mystery illness, while in Portsmouth, the crews treat an elderly diabetic patient with dangerously low blood sugar.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews attend a man who has fallen off his bike and a 4-year-old struggling with a painful case of tonsillitis. Plus, a 35-year-old man with chest pains proves very hard to find.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: South Central paramedics treat a pregnant woman who has fallen on her baby bump. Plus, paramedics are called to an unconscious child with a complex medical condition.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews deal with a cycling accident and a woman having a heart attack, while paramedics go above and beyond to get a 24-year-old with severe allergies some medication.

programme.title: The Maury Show: They're Back: Feuding Family Updates!
programme.desc: Some of our wildest guests return to give us some updates. Did the DNA results force these denying dads to step up? Did the lie detector results force these cheaters to become faithful?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With Your Family and 97 Women
programme.desc: These women are sure their lovers are cheating. Will these men be able to talk their way out of being busted on hidden camera?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Babies 5 DNA Tests. Is He The Father?
programme.desc: Today on Maury, we've got steaming mad mommas and daddies in denial. But could some of these men be right? What if they really aren't the father? Only Maury has the answers!

programme.desc: Kreisha and Jonathan's mom wants to prove to him that he fathered her baby. Plus, Brooke and Wade's relationship began as a teenage romance, but ends with a paternity test!

programme.desc: Travis swears that Crystal cheated and denies their daughter. Shamika's fiancée wants him to take a DNA test to prove that he fathered their three kids!

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.desc: What makes a good wife? Is it cooking, cleaning, raising the kids and having great sex? Dr. Phil says too few couples understand what it means to be a "Mrs." He delves into the role of the wife in 2005.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Faith and spirituality usually bring families together. However, one family says they've been torn apart. Chelsea, her sister Tara, and her mom, Linda, claim their beloved, Amy, who claims to be "Mother God" is now allegedly a "cult leader". Pt. 1

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET TECHNOLOGIES
programme.desc: Scientists, engineers, military, and intelligence agencies push boundaries with unlimited budgets and secrecy. This episode unveils known (or suspected) top-secret projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PARANORMAL ACTIVITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at paranormal activities including apparitions and ghosts, the dark day mystery, Marian Apparitions, curses, warnings from beyond, spontaneous combustion.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS TEXTS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries related to ancient texts including the Egyptian Book of the Dead, the Torah, the Secrets of Fulcanelli, the Tao Te Ching, the Vedas.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SUPERNATURAL ABILITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at supernatural abilities including exceptional endurance in fire-walking and the festival of penitence, telepathy, shamans, mysterious recoveries from illness, clairvoyance.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET CULTS AND ORDERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at secret cults and mysterious orders including Skull and Bones at Yale University, the Freemasons, Thule and Vril Societies, the Bullingdon Club, the Hermetic Order of the Golden Dawn

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MEDICAL MYSTERIES
programme.desc: Medical history is rife with jaw-dropping oddities, miraculous recoveries, and unsolved mysteries. Beyond shock value, these cases showcase human resilience and the vast unknowns in understanding the body and mind.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Metropolitan Museum, New York
programme.desc: From the mystery of a king’s madness to a silver chalice some think is the Holy Grail, discover the secrets inside the Metropolitan Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Bardo Museum, Tunisia
programme.desc: From the real lives of gladiators to the connection between Star Wars and Tunisia, discover the secrets inside the Bardo Museum.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Crystal Cave

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes To Camp/Buster Makes The Grade
programme.desc: Arthur and his friends go to summer camp where it's strictly boys vs. girls. Next, Buster Baxter is everyone's favorite jokester. Unfortunately, though, Buster's grades aren't as good as his jokes, and Buster may have to repeat third grade.

programme.title: Arthur: The Great MacGrady, Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: When Mrs. MacGrady is diagnosed with cancer, Arthur and his friends all react differently to the news. The kids must learn how to come together to help support each other and Mrs. MacGrady.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Treasure Hunt/The Return Of The King
programme.desc: When Buster digs up an ancient arrowhead, everyone else wants to hunt for buried treasures, too. And a field trip to the Medieval Fair pits Arthur's class against another led by Ratburn's super-tough mentor, Mr. Pryce-Jones.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 1 - The Soviet air force, played a crucial role in World War II by contributing significantly to the Eastern Front's air superiority, conducting strategic bombing campaigns, and providing close air support for ground operations.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 2 - The Soviet air force, played a crucial role in World War II by contributing significantly to the Eastern Front's air superiority, conducting strategic bombing campaigns, and providing close air support for ground operations.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: The British Royal Air Force (RAF) played a pivotal role in World War II, notably during the Battle of Britain where it successfully defended against the German Luftwaffe's aerial onslaught in 1940.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: During World War II, the United States Army Air Forces (USAAF) played a pivotal role in the Allied victory. The USAAF fielded a diverse and technologically advanced aircraft, including the iconic B-17 Flying Fortress and the B-29 Superfortress.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleased 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Bomb: Episode 1
programme.desc: Did Nazi uranium make it to Japan in the final months of WW2? Were the Axis powers closer to a bomb than we think? Drama unfolds as experts shed new light on the hardships, challenges and secrets of a war-torn, pre-nuclear world.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: B24: The Liberator proved its worth in WWII over Europe and the Pacific, modeled after the B-17, delivering blows to the Axis.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: False Dawns
programme.desc: After the fall of France in 1940, Dönitz’s trio of aces embark on a race to sink British merchant ships. In Britain, the woman who will frustrate his plans turns the Women’s Royal Naval Service into a force to be reckoned with.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: A 23-year-old Hitler, living hand-to-mouth as a painter in Vienna, Austria, discovers a sacred spear in the city's Hofburg Museum

programme.title: The Real Hunt for Red October: Part 2

programme.title: The Sound And The Fury

programme.desc: Mutagen, sent by Krang from Dimension X, changes four Florida frogs into half-human creatures four and a half feet tall. Shredder, training them in his evil ways, names them Attila the Frog, Genghis Frog, Rasputin the Mad Frog and Napoleon Bonafrog.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter No More
programme.desc: Michelangelo senses that their mentor is "mondo depressed" and Donatello finds a way of changing back Splinter the rat to Yoshi the man.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): New York's Shiniest
programme.desc: Shredder taps into New York's computers to steal plans for robots and creates an army of robots to destroy the Turtles and loot the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Neutrino teens Kala, Zak and Eask arrive on Earth and alert the Turtles to Shredder's latest plan to make "mindless zombies" of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Catwoman from Channel 6
programme.desc: A matter transporter results in strange happenings including TV reporter April O'Neil being put into a cat-like state and a tiger chasing the Turtles and Splinter, their mentor-rat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Technodrome
programme.desc: To bring the Technodrome back to Earth, Shredder is instructed to take over the Niagara Falls hydroelectric station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beneath These Streets
programme.desc: While the Turtles, in disguise, are at a movie, Shredder interrupts a press conference to steal a new medi-laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on Trial
programme.desc: While the Turtles go on a talk show to prove their innocence to the world, Krang steals a robot and some Solarbenite from a military warehouse, with the intention of destroying the Turtles himself.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the 50-Foot Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are planning Irma's birthday party, Shredder steals an Exaboron Isotope from a meteorite crash. Krang creates an Exaboron-powered Enlarging Ray which causes six times normal growth, with the intention of using it on Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Maltese Hamster
programme.desc: Shredder gives futuristic laser weapons to mobster Tony Vivaldi and his underlings. Shredder wants to find the Maltese Hamster statue of him, which has inside it the formula for ultimate fuel for the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sky Turtles
programme.desc: Krang creates a Gravity Altering Device which causes everyone in the city, including the Turtles, to start floating.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Nutty Hill is suffering from a stifling heat wave. Searching in vain for a bit of cool air, Grizzy suddenly has a brilliant idea.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Just as Grizzly was about to coat a nice big fresh salmon with chocolate spread and snuggle up in front of the TV, he discovers that the pantry is empty.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's nap is interrupted by an annoying vibration, the forest ranger's cell phone. It has various functions, including a game to which he instantly becomes addicted.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Freed by the thawing ice, a mysterious giant egg slides up to the front door of the log cabin and the Lemmings watch with interest as it hatches.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy decides to slim down with the ranger's bodybuilding equipment, but before starting his exercise routine, he will first have to settle the problem of the Lemmings, who are already using the machines as an amusement park.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: By chance, Grizzly discovers that the ranger's new robot vacuum cleaner also gives very pleasant back massages.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers a gadget that controls various functions in the cabin. He will finally be able to get rid of the Lemmings, without even leaving the couch.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: To make sure that the Lemmings don't snatch his chocolate spread, Grizzy turns the fridge into a safe. However, the Lemmings see Grizzy open the door while sleepwalking.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have invented a new popcorn game which consists of throwing popcorn and catching it with their mouths.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: After receiving a terrible blow on the head, Grizzly thinks he's a rodent and tries to get the gang to adopt him.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is exhausted, and he goes to fetch a pillow and a sleeping mask, but the Lemmings have entirely different plans for the couch.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers that the frenzied breakdance the Lemmings are doing is actually due to the fleas they are infested with.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have caught a little spider. Her sticky threads are perfect for bungee jumping. Grizzly, who has no intention of getting caught in the web, decides to crush the insect.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over chocolate-spread jar lids, which they use as chips to win goodies. But more importantly, there's a grand prize, a giant jar of Yummy.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has prepared himself a TV dinner to eat in front of his favourite series, but his moment of pleasure is abruptly interrupted by unexplained static.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he realises that his beloved she-bear adores the smell of flowers, Grizzy decides to offer her the geraniums that decorate the window ledges of the ranger's cabin.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Finally reaching Violet City, Ash’s search for the Gym is halted by a trip to the local Pokémon Academy. Ash does well playing teacher, until one pupil takes off with Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: It’s finally time for Ash’s first Johto League Gym battle, and he’s feeling confident. But Falkner’s Flying-type Pokémon prove to be tough competition! Can Ash take the win—and his first Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Back on the road after his first Johto Gym badge win, Ash and the gang find a cute Marill that won’t stop crying! Nothing our heroes try will stop it, and a Team Rocket raid certainly won’t help!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Team Rocket’s latest invention is bound to be a hit...until Togepi and its newfound Sentret friend take it out for a spin!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash hears of a training ground for wild Charizard and decides it's just the place to hone his own Charizard’s strength. But the tough lessons to be learned there will change Ash and Charizard’s friendship forever!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Back on the road to the Azalea Gym, our heroes discover a Sunflora festival in a nearby town and meet a Trainer whose Sunflora is too sad to compete. Can Ash and the gang put a smile on its face?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash is having a hard time getting his Chikorita to listen to him, and Nurse Joy thinks that it’s due to a bout of jealousy over Ash’s friendship with Pikachu! Can Ash prove how much Chikorita means to him?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Trainer whose Hoppip partners can predict the weather. But on the horizon, there are two storms approaching...and one of them goes by the name 'Team Rocket'!

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped, a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target
programme.desc: Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: On October 1, 2000, 10-year-old Heather Thomas disappeared from her father’s Cloverdale townhouse. Ertmoed is arrested and confesses that he lured Heather into his apartment on the pretext of showing her pictures of birds and strangles her to death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mortal Passion
programme.desc: In early April 2000, two students discover the lifeless body of a young woman on the edge of a river. The victim has wounds on her neck, but a murder weapon is not found at the scene. Investigators find a piece of paper in the victim’s pant pocket.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Addicted to Rage
programme.desc: Katie Socci stands by her fiancé, David, even after he's charged with stealing narcotics. But once she finally throws him out, he unleashes the deadly fury of a stalker scorned.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Badlands
programme.desc: Marie DePalma, a shy middle school student in Detroit, is thrilled when an older student takes an interest in her. As their relationship develops, her life turns into a living hell.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Rachel Wilson's marriage falls apart when husband Darrell starts hiring hookers. But when Rachel moves on and finds the perfect man, Darrell erupts in rage.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Puppet Master
programme.desc: Christy Martin is the toughest female boxer in the world. But outside the ring, Christy deals with the fight of her life as she's blackmailed and abused by her husband...who is also her coach.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted
programme.desc: When Kaia Anderson is kind to fellow student Robert, she never imagined it will lead to a lifelong obsession that won't be stopped by reason or the law.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Behind the Shield
programme.desc: Police officer Amy Johnson has been happily married for four years when, in the blink of an eye, her husband becomes a different man.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial By Fire
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Proof Of Innocence
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Trust
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the “victim” could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Things Come in Threes
programme.desc: When two young mothers are gunned down behind a crowded bar, Kenda has to first determine who was the intended target and who was collateral damage.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield uses Nermal’s cuteness to get goodies. The crew finds a chocolate mine.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield relates the tale of a lousy Italian chef (Jon). The Buddy Bears present a cultural moment.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Odie finds a genie and is granted his wish to fly. A witch decides Jon will be her husband.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield demonstrates the importance of sound effects. The Wolf convinces the crew aliens have landed.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: A ghost takes over Jon’s house. Roy tries for a job on a different show.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: A fast-talking salesman cons Jon. CatTV airs the latest video, “That’s Called Bein’ A Cat.”

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie trick Jon into not taking a trip on his vacation.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield tells how it was the Wright brothers’ cat that first flew at Kitty Hawk.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: A cartoonist in ancient times wins the hand of a maiden with the help of a cat looking for food.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield’s neighbor moves out and rent their house to a singer.

programme.title: On the Case: From Dusk to Darkness
programme.desc: After a 10-year-old girl mysteriously disappears, her family and the police undergo a tormenting journey to find a lead.

programme.title: On the Case: A Nightmare in Laurel
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears before her final shift at a Maryland hospital, her family begins a decades-long search for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: Evil Repeats Itself
programme.desc: Beautiful teenager Mary Jayne Jones is found murdered in a desolate farmhouse while its owner is out of town.

programme.title: On the Case: Terror in Terre Haute
programme.desc: When a young college student is abducted from her campus parking lot it marks the beginning of a terrifying crime wave on a quiet college campus. Can police catch a serial predator before he strikes again?

programme.title: On the Case: A Heartbreaking Discovery
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears police painstakingly retrace her last known movements. The trail of clues they uncover leads to a shocking and heartbreaking discovery.

programme.title: On the Case: Same Crime Next Year
programme.desc: A teenager is found murdered on the weekend of the Daytona 500 motor race in Daytona Beach, Florida. Then, one year later, police are called to the scene of a nearly identical crime.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Perfect Murder: Roger& David Cooper
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of two brothers who murdered a marketing manager on Christmas Eve 2014 using chloroform.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Appointment With Death: Scott Singleton
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of Scott Singleton, who murdered a 17-year-old girl after luring her to a bogus job interview.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Countryside Killings: Graham Backhouse
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the harrowing case of a London landlord who sadistically tortured and murdered two of his tenants.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Lewis Daynes
programme.desc: Breck Bednar was a loving, family-oriented 14-year-old who had lots of friends and excelled at school. But he was also seduced by the world of online gaming. He didn’t see the dangers when an older teen made lucrative job offers.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation in Texas
programme.desc: A report about the 2011 shooting death of Greg Williams, and the question of whether he was killed with his own gun by an intruder inside his suburban Dallas home - as his wife Michele Williams has claimed - or if Michele herself was guilty of the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Alternate Suspects
programme.desc: A football coach serves nine years in prison for the murder of his wife before a Texas Court of Criminal Appeals finds he didn't get a fair trial.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Driven to Extremes
programme.desc: Authorities investigate a case of love, infidelity, road rage and possible murder in Texas.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Killer App
programme.desc: The dangers of anonymous chat apps; a father discovers his 15-year-old daughter planning to run away with a 30-year-old man she met online; a teenage girl is found stabbed to death after making friends online.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Two women fight to keep the man convicted of killing their mother over 20 years earlier in prison, though he maintains his innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Soldier's Wife
programme.desc: A soldier claims the fatal shot he fired into the back of his young wife's head was an accident, but prosecutors say he did it intentionally in a fit of jealousy.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Second Case
programme.desc: A woman’s mangled body is found beside a lonely stretch of highway. When the coroner suspects foul play, Kenda is called in to solve the second homicide case of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: 24yr old Lorraine Laribo is dropped off at a bar by her sister's boyfriend. It's the last time anyone would ever see her alive again. Kenda must use his interrogation skills to find her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit, because he used Phil’s (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Soccer Episode
programme.desc: Young Kevin gets a kick out of soccer, but Nick doesn't see the appeal. Meanwhile, Lindsey's secretiveness exasperates Suzanne, who then snoops online into her teen daughter's private life.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Rat inThe House Episode
programme.desc: When a rat gets lost in the home, Kevin scurries to care for it. Meanwhile, an ex-flame creates surging tension between Lindsey and Gigi.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Booty Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne isn't a sport when Nick watches a game with friends at a sports bar with alluring waitresses. Elsewhere, the children ask for more allowance, but they reject doing any added chores.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Viral Video Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne becomes a viral-video sensation after she's caught dancing on camera. Meanwhile, Marilyn serves up soul-food lessons to young Lindsey.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Michelle Obama Sweater Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey taps into her mother's credit card to order a sweater. Elsewhere, Kevin feigns being ill to score a coveted baseball jersey.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The No Nah Nah Episode
programme.desc: An exhausted Nick resists Suzanne's romantic advances, leading her to worry about the health of their relationship.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Get Together Episode
programme.desc: Nick recommends throwing a social event with family and friends in a bid to strengthen family ties, but his sloppy planning results in chaos.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Mr. Himdependent Episode
programme.desc: When Suzanne's ex-husband wants to lower his monthly child support payments, Nick jumps at the chance to get rid of Frank's financial support, while Suzanne has mixed feelings about Frank.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The We Ain't Going Out Like That Episode
programme.desc: When Nick tries to be spontaneous, but Suzanne resists and instead plans a date night that fails, they attempt to be spontaneous together--until they realize it's better if she makes plan.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Oh No She Di-in't Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne grows jealous of Nick's pretty young field producer. Elsewhere, Gigi falls for a man, who has children, so she enlists Kevin and Lindsey to help her better relate to kids.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: A bizarre murder case began when police attended the scene of a dog barking outside a camper van. Inside, they found its owner, Tony Robinson, murdered.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Despite only being trialled and convicted for the death of a single victim, Mary Ann Cotton is often classed as Britain's worst female serial killer.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a murderer terrorised Edinburgh, killing young women in what became known as 'The World's End Murders'. 37 years later, Angus Sinclair would be convicted.

programme.title: Body In The Water
programme.desc: Police divers training in Loch Lomond, Scotland, discover human body parts. Detectives face a battle to put the killer behind bars as the prime suspect flees.

programme.title: Body In The Water
programme.desc: A murdered US woman is found in a duffle-bag washed up on the Florida coast. Her married, military lover is the prime suspect, and a single gold earring seals his fate.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.

programme.desc: On September 11th 2011, in Èze, near Monaco, the owner of a luxury villa discovers the lifeless hanging body of his tenant, a rich German businessman.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case
programme.desc: On March 28th 2013, the burnt body of Anne Barbot, 38 years old, is discovered in a forest of Maine-et-Loire.

programme.desc: On June 12th 2007, in Berhen-lès-Forbach, in Moselle, a young woman reports the disappearance of her brother Raphaël Lomoro, 46 years old vanilla producer living in Madagascar.

programme.desc: The murder of Mamadou Magassouba, teacher and former boxing champion from Saint Ouen.

programme.title: The Case: Deadly Rumour
programme.desc: It isn't his first crime scene, yet six years later it will continue to haunt him.

programme.desc: From 1995, a series of rapes, followed by murders shook the region of Perpignan.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
